name: Southwest Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine shredded cheddar cheese and sliced ripe olives.
3. Cook bacon slices until crispy in a skillet over medium heat. Drain on paper towels.
4. Add chopped red bell pepper and whole kernel corn to the skillet with the bacon. Sauté for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, half & half, and ground red pepper until well combined.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese-olive mixture in a separate bowl.
7. Add cooked bacon, red bell pepper, corn, and mix thoroughly.
8. Transfer the batter to a greased 9-inch springform pan or similar baking dish.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until set and firm.
10. Allow the torte to cool completely in the pan before removing from the rim of the pan.
